decision_policy.adoption_style: adopts when the payoff is concrete and the risk feels bounded

operational_thresholds.setup_time_limit: under 20 minutes to import contacts and create first task
operational_thresholds.data_portability: CSV/Excel export available without premium tier
operational_thresholds.privacy_guarantee: explicit statement that data is not used for training or shared with third parties
operational_thresholds.rollback_plan: one-click deactivation with full data archive before cancelling subscription

communication_preferences.format: prefers numbered steps, bullet points, and short sentences; avoids marketing jargon and abstract ROI claims
communication_preferences.validation_method: asks for screenshot walkthroughs of the exact screen he will see after signup
communication_preferences.question_pattern: typically follows up with 'What happens if I stop using it?' or 'Can I run this with dummy data first?'
communication_preferences.tone: measured, pragmatic, and focused on operational stability rather than novelty

audit.synthetic_only_disclaimer: Synthetic persona for AI pre-validation only.

llm_enrichment.rationale: The enrichment preserves all seed facts and identity anchors while grounding them in observable regional SEA behavior: bilingual switching, WhatsApp-centric ops, FPX/invoice billing preferences, and PDPA-aware data caution. The tension between high caregiving load and contract-based income is explained through fragmented attention windows and the need for low-friction capture. A concrete Q3 failure memory justifies current caution. The current workaround (notebook + Sheets + WhatsApp broadcasts) is specified. Willingness to try, pay, and roll out are explicitly separated. Mainstream panel role is visible through measured adoption, peer-referral reliance, and feature skepticism. Locale is embedded in channels, support expectations, and trust norms. All constraints are satisfied without abstract SaaS phrasing.
